title: SHMamplan
description: Software Hub deployment configuration. Minimal format for self-service tool deployments. auth=True is an implicit Python-level constant, not stored in this schema.

project_id.description: Normalized identifier: {username}-{tool}. No capital letters or underscores allowed.

tool.description: Name of the MaMplate tool to use.

cluster.description: Target cluster identifier. Must match a key in the Mampok config.

bucket.description: S3 storage bucket name for user data. No capital letters or underscores allowed.

lifetime.description: Project expiration date in ISO 8601 UTC datetime format.

status.description: Indicates whether the deployment is currently active.

url.description: Deployment access URL. Set by deploy(). No capital letters allowed.

owner.description: Username of the container owner. Has sole access via the auth secret.
